app.title: Deckbound
app.tagline: Choose your path through the endless deck
app.loadFailHint: Please serve the game over HTTP (e.g. npx http-server). Opening index.html directly cannot load config files.

howto.title: 📜 How to Play
howto.body:
World　The world is an endless deck of cards. You don't draw cards — you walk on them. Reach the Throne of Fate on floor 50 to win.

Vision　You only ever see two rows: in the first row (near) the middle 5 cards are visible and clickable; in the second row (far) only the 3 cards ahead are revealed, for observation only.

Movement　Click a card in the first row to move: the 3 cards ahead are free; farther cards cost 1 energy per extra step. Every 3 floors of travel drains 1 energy. Keyboard: ←→↑ (or A/D/W).

Energy　Recover energy by resting, and via cards like springs, camps, food and shrines.

Rest　Rest restores 1 energy; both visible rows slide as a whole — including unrevealed backs. At most 2 effective rests per floor; after that cards still move but no energy returns. Shortcut: R.

Monsters　Monsters have levels (Lv) and affixes: the Weak are easy prey, while the Feral and the Ancient are far deadlier — read the power number before you strike.

Power & EXP　Power is the single combat number: higher than the monster wins, lower loses — that simple. Kills grant power and EXP scaled by enemy strength (elite EXP ×1.5, boss ×3); leveling up raises max HP, +1 power every 2 levels. A crit is a "perfect kill": EXP ×1.5, gold ×1.3, +1 bonus power. Defeat costs HP by the power gap and knocks you back.

Gear　Picking up gear never overwrites what you wear: choose to equip it, bag it, or sell it; swap bagged gear anytime with a tap.

Rarity　The colored dot at a card's bottom-right shows its rarity: blue=Rare　purple=Epic　orange=Legendary　red=Mythic (Common shows no dot). Higher rarity means stronger gear.

Class skills　Each class has one active skill (the golden button in the action bar): Shield Wall, Eagle Eye, Blink, Prayer, Execute… Cooldowns tick per floor advanced — save them for the right moment.

Relics　Relics are rule-bending passives: fire immunity, mimic-proof chests, free sidesteps, rebirth on death… Wardens always drop one; the Wishing Pool and Auction House trade them too. Collect and combine them into your own build.

Biomes　Each chapter has its own ecology: the Bone Wastes crawl with curses and traps, the Burning Abyss spreads flame, the Mirror Gallery spawns mirror walkers — adapt your strategy to the land.

Weather　Weather shifts every few floors: fog shrinks vision, rain stops fire from spreading, the blood moon empowers monsters but boosts gold, tailwinds cheapen sidesteps. Shown on the quest bar.

Risky gear　A few items are powerful at a price (the Bloodblade drains 1 HP per floor) — the description tells you plainly; wearing it is your call.

Old acquaintances　The deck remembers you: the old man rewards repeat encounters, and the witch offers a moonherb-gathering errand.

The deck drifts　The world is alive: monsters wander, merchants leave, chests get looted by other adventurers, fire spreads, curses creep.

Hero & death　Your hero is persistent: power, stats, gear, gold and level save in real time. Floor progress is remembered too: retreat (via Settings) saves your spot; death costs some gold and sends you back to the chapter start.

The hub　Adventure is the only source of growth; take your hero to the Arena (stake duels, winner takes gear), Auction House, Trial Tower, Boss Hunt, Casino and Wishing Pool. Classic runs (daily/endless/race) use a fresh character and reward your hero gold per floor.

prologue.title: Prologue · The World Became Cards
prologue.text:
No one remembers what happened that night.

When they woke, the land, the towns, the mountains and seas were gone — replaced by a vast array of cards stretching endlessly northward. Every card is a road, an enemy, a choice.

The last prophecy of the diviners: "Go north. Through mist, bone, flame and mirror — upon the fiftieth card sits the Throne of Fate that can rewrite it all."

Countless adventurers set out. None returned.

Now it is your turn.

hub.classicIntro: Classic runs use a fresh temporary character; your hero earns floor ×{n} gold on settlement.
hub.resetHeroSub: Delete the current hero and start over (meta unlocks remain)
hub.resetConfirm: Delete your hero? Power, gear and gold will be wiped. This cannot be undone.

arena.title: ⚔️ Arena
arena.intro: Stake gold and duel another adventurer (best of three). Winner takes both stakes and the loser's gear.
arena.winText: You won the duel! Gained {n} gold in stakes, plus the loser's gear:

auction.title: 🏛️ Auction House
auction.intro: Listings from other adventurers. Your gold: {gold}

tower.title: 🗼 Trial Tower · Floor {n}
tower.enemy: This floor's guardian: power {power} (yours {mine}, est. {odds}% win)
tower.defeatText: The guardian beat you back. Half the pot lost — you keep 💰{n}.
tower.settleText: You climbed to floor {floor} and brought back 💰{gold}.

hunt.title: 🐉 Boss Hunt
hunt.intro: Pay the entry fee to challenge an empowered warden. Victory guarantees high-rarity loot.
hunt.loseText: {name} was far stronger than expected. The 💰{fee} fee is gone.

casino.title: 🎰 Casino of Fate
casino.intro: "Whose side is Lady Luck on today?"　Your gold: {gold}
casino.cardIntro: Only one of three cards hides the gem. Payout ×{mult}.

wish.title: ⛩️ Wishing Pool
wish.intro: Wish to the gods deep in the deck for gear. Total wishes: {total}
wish.resultHint: Click gear to keep (equip or bag); the rest auto-sells on close

modes.title: 🂠 Choose a Mode
modes.adventureDesc: Five chapters — reach the Throne of Fate on floor 50
modes.endlessDesc: No finish line — go as deep as you can (best: {n})
modes.dailyDesc: One shared map per day ({date} best: {n})
modes.versusDesc: Race an AI adventurer to floor {n} ({w}W {l}L)

versus.rivalDied: 🪦 {name} fell in the deck! Just reach the goal alive to win
versus.winText: You reached floor {n} first. {name}'s silhouette fades into the deck.
versus.loseText: {name} reached floor {n} before you. Walk faster next time.
versus.loseDeadText: You fell along the way, while {name} kept walking.

class.pickHint: Fate deals you five cards — pick one to begin

steps.player: This is you. You stand on the bottom row and can only advance one floor per turn.
steps.near: The first row (near). The middle 5 cards are visible — the 3 ahead are free to enter; the outer two cost 1 energy per extra step.
steps.far: The second row (far). Only the 3 cards ahead are revealed. You can't click them, but you can plan your route.
steps.energy: Energy. Long sidesteps and long journeys (every 3 floors) drain it. Recover via rest, springs, camps and food.
steps.power: Power. It only grows by defeating enemies. Clicking a monster starts an instant auto-battle — higher power wins.
steps.rest: Low on energy? Rest: +1 energy, and the cards in sight slide as a whole. Note: at most 2 effective rests per floor.
steps.quest: Your goal. Cross the chapters and reach the Throne of Fate on floor 50 to rewrite this world. Good luck.

quest.goalReach: Goal: reach floor {n} and defeat the warden (now floor {cur})
quest.goalFinal: Final battle: floor {n} · Throne of Fate (now floor {cur})
quest.goalEndless: Endless mode · floor {cur} — the deeper you go, the louder the legend

weekly.noRest: 👁️ Sleepless rule: no resting this week — survive on food and springs

backup.title: 💾 Save Backup
backup.sub: Export/import a save code (device transfer or safety)
backup.exportHint: Below is your save code — copy it somewhere safe. To import, paste a save code here and click import.
backup.import: 📥 Import the code in the box above
backup.importHint: Overwrites your current hero and records — be careful
backup.invalid: ❌ Invalid save code — check it is complete

toast.runStart: 🂠 The {cls} steps onto the deck. North, to floor 50.
toast.tooFar: 🌫️ Too far to see that card… move sideways first
toast.noEnergy: ⚡ Not enough energy (need {n}) — take a rest
toast.fatigue: ⚡ The long journey drains you: energy -{n}
toast.restTired: 😪 The deck's whispers keep you awake… (rest is spent this floor, but the cards still move)
toast.drift: 🌊 The deck shifts in the dark…
toast.rest: 🏕️ You rest: energy +{n}. The cards quietly shifted positions
toast.bossAhead: ⚠️ A roar from afar… the warden is ahead!
toast.fightWinCrit: 💥 Perfect kill on {name}! Power +{power}, EXP +{exp}, gold +{gold}
toast.levelUp: 🎉 Level up! Lv.{n}: max HP +3 (+1 power / 2 lv, +1 max energy / 5 lv)
toast.fightLoseBloodPact: 🩸 Blood Pact! Beaten by {name} for {dmg} damage — but you push through!
toast.fireImmune: 🧿 The Ember Charm absorbs the flames: energy +1
toast.phoenixRevive: 🪶 The Phoenix Feather burns out! You rise reborn at full HP
toast.skillShieldBlock: 🛡️ Shield Wall blocks all damage from {name}!
toast.herbSold: 🌿 Just a weed… sold for 2 gold
toast.bossBurn: 🔥 The lingering embers scorch you: HP -3
toast.swapWeapon: 🗡️ Swapped to {name}, old weapon sold for {n} gold
toast.swapArmor: 🛡️ Swapped to {name}, old armor sold for {n} gold
toast.eatFoodFull: 🍖 Bag full — ate {name} on the spot (HP +{hp}, energy +{energy})
toast.keyFull: 🗝️ Bag full — the key stays behind…
toast.cursed: 💀 You are cursed! Power -2 (removable at shops)
toast.doorOpen: 🚪 The key opens the hidden door! Gold +{gold}, power +2
toast.doorLocked: 🚪 The door is locked — no key, only a peek through the crack…
toast.teleport: 🌀 The portal pushes you one floor ahead!
toast.keepKey: 🗝️ Keep the key for hidden doors

gear.title: Found {name}
gear.oldSold: Bag full — {name} will be sold (+{n} gold)

chain.witchAcceptSub: Gather 3 moonherbs for her (they appear in the deck while active)
chain.witchAccepted: 🌿 Errand accepted: watch for moonherbs in the deck
chain.witchDoneText: The witch takes the moonherbs, a rare softness in her eyes. "A deal's a deal, adventurer." She traces a sigil on your palm — power +5, gold +40.
chain.oldGiftSub: Third meeting — the old man remembers you
chain.oldGifted: 🎁 "We meet again." The old man pats your shoulder — power +3

relic.allOwned: 🏺 All relics collected — the warden's trophy becomes 50 gold

shop.title: 🧙 Wandering Merchant
shop.greeting: "Have a look, traveler. There is no other shop in the deck."　Your gold:
shop.manageBagSub: {n}/{max} slots (eat food or sell gear here to free space)
shop.fullEaten: Bag full — ate it on the spot

inv.title: 🎒 Bag
inv.hint: Click an item to use it

settings.title: ⚙️ Settings
settings.seed:
World seed: {seed}
The same seed generates the same deck (reserved for daily challenges)
settings.restartSub: Keep everything gained, no death penalty

over.deathText: Death is a new beginning. The deck has been reshuffled; fate awaits the next challenger.
over.winText: You sit upon the Throne of Fate. The deck folds beneath you, and the world returns to what it was — at least until the next shuffle.
over.heroDeathText: You were sent back to the hub. Your power and gear are intact — the deck cannot take the road you've walked.
over.heroDeathLoss: 💸 Death toll: lost {n} gold (power and gear kept)
over.heroCheckpoint: 🚩 Progress falls back to the chapter start: floor {n} next time
over.heroRetreatText: You withdrew safely, bringing everything back to the hub.
over.classicReward: 🏰 Challenge reward: your hero gains {n} gold

chapter.finaleEnd: 👑 End the run, take the crown
